title: 사이버펑크 서울 (Cyberpunk Seoul)
prompt: 모든 디테일이 살아있는 미래 지향적 사이트: A hyper-realistic cyberpunk cityscape of Seoul in the future, neon signs in Korean, flying vehicles, rainy night with reflections, cinematic lighting, 8k resolution, volumetric fog, highly detailed digital art style.

title: 미니멀리즘 인테리어 (Zen Design)
prompt: 평온함을 주는 공간 디자인: A minimalist Zen-style interior design, large windows showing a bamboo forest, soft natural sunlight, organic textures, clay vases, neutral beige and white palette, high-end architectural photography.

title: 추상 리퀴드 골드 (Liquid Gold)
prompt: 고급스러운 럭셔리 질감: Abstract liquid gold and marble texture, flowing organic shapes, luxury aesthetic, metallic reflections, high contrast, macro photography, 3D render.
